_comment: Sanitized golden fixture for ActOne/XSE production-style AWS architecture (#1033). Represents SFTP-to-S3 ingest, AppStream desktop access, multi-ALB, multi-AZ VPC subnets, custom pods, RDS Multi-AZ, EFS, Kafka (MSK), Elasticsearch, Container Insights, XSight, and active-active/failover HA labels. Do NOT mutate expected_detections or source_topology without a corresponding test-threshold bump.

_meta.purpose: fidelity regression gate for dense enterprise AWS-to-Azure translation

title: ActOne/XSE Production AWS Architecture (sanitized)

components.name: SFTP Endpoint
components.notes: External data partners deliver files via SFTP

components.name: S3 Ingest Bucket
components.notes: Primary landing zone for SFTP-delivered files

components.name: Internal ALB
components.notes: Internal ALB routing between microservice pods

components.name: ActOne
components.notes: Core case management and investigation orchestration workload

components.name: CMaaS
components.notes: Case Management as a Service orchestration layer

components.name: RDS Multi-AZ
components.notes: Primary relational store with synchronous standby in second AZ

components.name: EFS
components.notes: Shared file storage mounted by multiple pods

components.name: Kafka (MSK)
components.notes: Event streaming backbone; brokers spread across AZ-A and AZ-B

components.name: Elasticsearch
components.notes: Full-text search and analytics for case data; multi-AZ domain

components.name: Container Insights
components.notes: Container-level metrics and logs for EKS workloads

components.name: XSight
components.notes: Proprietary observability integration; semantics partially unresolved

mappings.rationale: Azure Blob Storage supports SFTP protocol natively; functionally equivalent for partner file ingest
assumptions: Partners can reconfigure SFTP host keys
Blob Storage SFTP is enabled on the target account

mappings.rationale: Blob Storage is the direct Azure equivalent for object storage at scale
Azure Virtual Desktop provides equivalent managed desktop streaming with per-user session isolation
assumptions: AppStream custom images can be rebuilt as AVD session host images
unresolved_blockers: AppStream-specific IAM role bindings need manual review

mappings.rationale: Application Gateway provides L7 HTTP(S) routing matching ALB functionality
Internal ALB translates to Azure Internal Load Balancer for east-west traffic
Custom proprietary workload; no Azure service equivalent identified at this stage. Preserved by original name.
unresolved_blockers: ActOne workload semantics require customer clarification before Azure service selection

mappings.rationale: Custom proprietary workload; preserved by original name pending architecture review.
unresolved_blockers: AVA workload semantics require customer clarification before Azure service selection

mappings.rationale: Custom proprietary workload; preserved by original name pending architecture review.
unresolved_blockers: UDM workload semantics require customer clarification before Azure service selection

mappings.rationale: Custom proprietary workload; preserved by original name pending architecture review.
unresolved_blockers: IR workload semantics require customer clarification before Azure service selection

mappings.rationale: Custom proprietary workload; preserved by original name pending architecture review.
unresolved_blockers: CMaaS workload semantics require customer clarification before Azure service selection

mappings.rationale: Custom proprietary workload; preserved by original name pending architecture review.
unresolved_blockers: DataExtract workload semantics require customer clarification before Azure service selection

mappings.azure_service: Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server
mappings.rationale: PostgreSQL Flexible Server with zone-redundant HA matches RDS Multi-AZ semantics
assumptions: Zone-redundant HA enabled on Flexible Server
Data migrated using pg_dump or Azure DMS

mappings.rationale: Azure Files provides managed NFS/SMB shared file storage equivalent to EFS
assumptions: NFS 4.1 protocol selected on Azure Files premium tier

mappings.rationale: Event Hubs Kafka-compatible endpoint enables producer/consumer migration without code rewrite
assumptions: Kafka client version is compatible with Event Hubs Kafka surface
unresolved_blockers: Schema Registry migration path requires validation

mappings.rationale: Elastic Cloud on Azure preserves Elasticsearch APIs and index compatibility
assumptions: Elastic operator or Elastic Cloud subscription required
unresolved_blockers: Index mapping compatibility must be verified for major version differences

mappings.rationale: Azure Monitor Container Insights provides equivalent container-level metrics, logs, and dashboards for AKS

mappings.azure_service: XSight (custom observability — preserved, Azure integration TBD)
mappings.rationale: Proprietary observability integration; semantics and Azure counterpart unresolved. Preserved by original name.
unresolved_blockers: XSight integration points and telemetry contracts must be clarified before mapping to Azure Monitor or a custom solution

mappings.rationale: Virtual Network is the direct Azure equivalent for AWS VPC isolation and routing
AKS provides managed Kubernetes equivalent to EKS; custom pods run unchanged after image migration
assumptions: Container images are cloud-agnostic and do not reference AWS SDK from within the image

expected_detections._comment: Regression gate: all items below must appear in the source_topology components. Test should fail if any is silently dropped.
